input.value:
smartscapeNodes CONTAINER   
| fieldsRename containername=name
| traverse is_part_of, K8S_POD, fieldsKeep:{id,containername} 
| fieldsAdd podname= k8s.pod.name, podid=id
| traverse is_part_of, K8S_DEPLOYMENT,fieldsKeep:{  podname, podid}
| fieldsAdd podname = dt.traverse.history[1][podname], podid = dt.traverse.history[1][podid], containername=dt.traverse.history[0][containername],containerid=dt.traverse.history[0][id]
| fieldsAdd Appnamespace = in(k8s.namespace.name, "dynatrace","kube-system","falco","kyverno","gmp-system","cert-manager","kuma-system","opentelemetry-operator-system")
| filter not Appnamespace
| fieldsAdd optimization= if(isNotNull( `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/enabled`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/enabled`],else: "false") 
| fieldsAdd owner= if(isNotNull( `tags:k8s.labels`[dt.owner]), `tags:k8s.labels`[dt.owner],else: "NA") 
| fieldsAdd github_repo= if(isNotNull( `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-rep`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-rep`],else: "NA") 
| fieldsAdd github_path= if(isNotNull( `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`],else: "NA") 
| fieldsAdd github_branch= if(isNotNull( `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`],else: "NA") 
| fieldsAdd k8sobject= k8s.object
| lookup [
   timeseries memusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.memory_working_set ),memrequest_value=avg(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_memory ),cpusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage ),cpurequest_value=avg(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_cpu ) , by:{dt.smartscape.container}, from: -7d
    | fieldsAdd request_memory = arrayPercentile(memrequest_value,95) 
    | fieldsAdd usage_memory = arrayPercentile(memusagevalues,95) 
	| fieldsAdd request_cpu = arrayPercentile(cpurequest_value,95) 
    | fieldsAdd usage_cpu= arrayPercentile(cpusagevalues,95) 
    | fieldsAdd memratio = (usage_memory/request_memory) * 100
	| fieldsAdd cpuratio = (usage_cpu/request_cpu) * 100    
  ], sourceField:containerid, lookupField:dt.smartscape.container, fields:{ memratio,usage_memory,request_memory,cpuratio,request_cpu,usage_cpu }
| dedup containername, k8s.workload.name
| filter isNotNull(cpuratio) AND isNotNull(memratio) AND isNotNull(usage_cpu) AND isNotNull( usage_memory) AND isNotNull(request_cpu) AND isNotNull(request_memory)
| filter (memratio < 60 or memratio> 110) or ( cpuratio < 30 or cpuratio > 110)

grail.canonicalQuery:
smartscapeNodes CONTAINER
| fieldsRename containername = name
| traverse {is_part_of}, {K8S_POD}, fieldsKeep:{id, containername}
| fieldsAdd podname = k8s.pod.name, podid = id
| traverse {is_part_of}, {K8S_DEPLOYMENT}, fieldsKeep:{podname, podid}
| fieldsAdd podname = dt.traverse.history[1][podname], podid = dt.traverse.history[1][podid], containername = dt.traverse.history[0][containername], containerid = dt.traverse.history[0][id]
| fieldsAdd Appnamespace = in(k8s.namespace.name, {"dynatrace", "kube-system", "falco", "kyverno", "gmp-system", "cert-manager", "kuma-system", "opentelemetry-operator-system"})
| filter NOT Appnamespace
| fieldsAdd optimization = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/enabled`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/enabled`], else:"false")
| fieldsAdd owner = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.labels`[dt.owner]), `tags:k8s.labels`[dt.owner], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd github_repo = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-rep`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-rep`], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd github_path = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd github_branch = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd k8sobject = k8s.object
| lookup 
	[
		timeseries from:-7d, by:{dt.smartscape.container}, {memusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.memory_working_set), memrequest_value = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_memory), cpusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage), cpurequest_value = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_cpu)}
		| fieldsAdd request_memory = arrayPercentile(memrequest_value, 95)
		| fieldsAdd usage_memory = arrayPercentile(memusagevalues, 95)
		| fieldsAdd request_cpu = arrayPercentile(cpurequest_value, 95)
		| fieldsAdd usage_cpu = arrayPercentile(cpusagevalues, 95)
		| fieldsAdd memratio = usage_memory / request_memory * 100
		| fieldsAdd cpuratio = usage_cpu / request_cpu * 100
	], sourceField:containerid, lookupField:dt.smartscape.container, fields:{memratio, usage_memory, request_memory, cpuratio, request_cpu, usage_cpu}
| dedup containername, k8s.workload.name
| filter isNotNull(cpuratio) AND isNotNull(memratio) AND isNotNull(usage_cpu) AND isNotNull(usage_memory) AND isNotNull(request_cpu) AND isNotNull(request_memory)
| filter memratio < 60 OR memratio > 110 OR (cpuratio < 30 OR cpuratio > 110)

metrics.description: This metric measures the current working set memory (memory that cannot be reclaimed under pressure) by container. The OOM Killer is invoked if the working set exceeds the limit. The most detailed level of aggregation is container.
This metric measures the memory requests. The most detailed level of aggregation is container. The value is the memory requests of a container.
This metric measures the total CPU consumed (user usage + system usage) by container. The most detailed level of aggregation is container.
This metric measures the cpu requests. The most detailed level of aggregation is container. The value is the cpu requests of a container.

grail.canonicalQuery:
smartscapeNodes CONTAINER
| fieldsRename containername = name
| traverse {is_part_of}, {K8S_POD}, fieldsKeep:{id, containername}
| fieldsAdd podname = k8s.pod.name, podid = id
| traverse {is_part_of}, {K8S_DEPLOYMENT}, fieldsKeep:{podname, podid}
| fieldsAdd podname = dt.traverse.history[1][podname], podid = dt.traverse.history[1][podid], containername = dt.traverse.history[0][containername], containerid = dt.traverse.history[0][id]
| fieldsAdd Appnamespace = in(k8s.namespace.name, {"dynatrace", "kube-system", "falco", "kyverno", "gmp-system", "cert-manager", "kuma-system", "opentelemetry-operator-system"})
| filter NOT Appnamespace
| fieldsAdd optimization = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/enabled`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/enabled`], else:"false")
| fieldsAdd owner = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.labels`[dt.owner]), `tags:k8s.labels`[dt.owner], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd github_repo = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-rep`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-rep`], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd github_path = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd github_branch = if(isNotNull(`tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`], else:"NA")
| fieldsAdd k8sobject = k8s.object
| lookup 
	[
		timeseries from:-7d, by:{dt.smartscape.container}, {memusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.memory_working_set), memrequest_value = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_memory), cpusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage), cpurequest_value = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_cpu)}
		| fieldsAdd request_memory = arrayPercentile(memrequest_value, 95)
		| fieldsAdd usage_memory = arrayPercentile(memusagevalues, 95)
		| fieldsAdd request_cpu = arrayPercentile(cpurequest_value, 95)
		| fieldsAdd usage_cpu = arrayPercentile(cpusagevalues, 95)
		| fieldsAdd memratio = usage_memory / request_memory * 100
		| fieldsAdd cpuratio = usage_cpu / request_cpu * 100
	], sourceField:containerid, lookupField:dt.smartscape.container, fields:{memratio, usage_memory, request_memory, cpuratio, request_cpu, usage_cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpuratio) AND isNotNull(memratio) AND isNotNull(usage_cpu) AND isNotNull(usage_memory) AND isNotNull(request_cpu) AND isNotNull(request_memory)
| filter memratio < 60 OR memratio > 110 OR (cpuratio < 30 OR cpuratio > 110)
| fieldsAdd cpurecommended = usage_cpu * 1.3, memoryrecommened = usage_memory * 1.3
| fields workloadid = id, containername, k8sobject, workloadname = k8s.workload.name, podname, clustername = k8s.cluster.name, owner, memratio, cpuratio, memoryrecommened, cpurecommended, usage_memory, request_memory, optimization, github_repo, github_path, github_branch

| fieldsAdd github_path= if(isNotNull( `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-path`],else: "NA")
| fieldsAdd github_branch= if(isNotNull( `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`]), `tags:k8s.annotations`[`resource-optimization.dynatrace.com/github-branch`],else: "NA")
| fieldsAdd k8sobject= k8s.object
| filter optimization == "true"
| filter github_repo != "NA" AND github_path != "NA" AND github_path!= "NA"


| lookup [
   timeseries memusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.memory_working_set ),memrequest_value=avg(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_memory ),cpusagevalues = max(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage ),cpurequest_value=avg(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_cpu ) , by:{dt.smartscape.container}, from: -7d
    | fieldsAdd request_memory = arrayPercentile(memrequest_value,95)
    | fieldsAdd usage_memory = arrayPercentile(memusagevalues,95)
    | fieldsAdd request_cpu = arrayPercentile(cpurequest_value,95)
    | fieldsAdd usage_cpu= arrayPercentile(cpusagevalues,95)
    | fieldsAdd memratio = (usage_memory/request_memory) * 100
    | fieldsAdd cpuratio = (usage_cpu/request_cpu) * 100
  ], sourceField:containerid, lookupField:dt.smartscape.container, fields:{ memratio,usage_memory,request_memory,cpuratio,request_cpu,usage_cpu }
| dedup containername, k8s.workload.name
| filter not contains(containername," ")
| filter isNotNull(cpuratio) AND isNotNull(memratio) AND isNotNull(usage_cpu) AND isNotNull( usage_memory) AND isNotNull(request_cpu) AND isNotNull(request_memory)
| filter (memratio < 60 or memratio> 110) or ( cpuratio < 30 or cpuratio > 110)
| fieldsAdd cpurecommended= usage_cpu * 1.30 , memoryrecommened = usage_memory * 1.30
| fields workloadid= id, containername, k8sobject,workloadname=k8s.workload.name,podname, clustername=k8s.cluster.name, owner, memratio, cpuratio, memoryrecommened, cpurecommended, usage_memory,request_memory,optimization, github_repo, github_path, github_branch , request_cpu
| fieldsAdd memsaving= request_memory - memoryrecommened , cpusaving= request_cpu - cpurecommended
| summarize
    k8sobject = takeFirst(k8sobject),
    github_repo = takeFirst(github_repo),
    github_path = takeFirst(github_path),
    github_branch = takeFirst(github_branch),
    owner = takeFirst(owner),
    optimization = takeFirst(optimization),
    clustername = takeFirst(clustername),
    containers = collectArray(
      record(
        containername,
        cpurecommended,
        memoryrecommened,
        request_cpu,
        request_memory,
        cpuratio,
        memratio,
        cpusaving,
        memsaving
      )
    ),
    by: { workloadname }
